servinfo.title: Security Alarm Mode Selection Procedure
servinfo.ptxt: Security alarm mode can be selected by performing the following procedure.

attention3.ptxt: Security alarm mode can also be selected by setting change function of SUZUKI scan tool.

s1.ptxt: Confirm that all doors are closed, all doors are unlocked and lighting switch OFF position.
Perform the following steps within 15 seconds.

s2.ptxt: Repeat Step a) and b) 3 times.
Operate driver door lock knob (1) to “LOCK” position.
Operate driver door lock knob to “UNLOCK” position.
Repeat Step d) and e) once.
Operate driver door lock knob to “LOCK” position.

s1.ptxt: Warning buzzer (in combination meter) sounds by the specified number for each mode as follows.

item.ptxt: Changed from “Passive” mode to “Active” mode: Buzzer sounds 4 times.
Changed from “Active” mode to “Passive” mode: Buzzer sounds once.
